title: MD
biography: Ian Donald was a Scottish physician who pioneered the use of diagnostic ultrasound in obstetrics. His work made it possible to safely visualize unborn babies and detect abnormalities.
aiSummary: Ian Donald is a obstetrics specialist at University of Glasgow. Based in Glasgow.

timeline.title: First diagnostic obstetric ultrasound
timeline.description: Published first paper on using ultrasound for diagnosis in obstetrics and gynecology
